case_title: BIRLASOFT, INC., A CORPORATION VS. MASTERS INTERNATIONAL, INC., A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-18-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRLASOFT, INC., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASTERS INTERNATIONAL, INC., A CORPORATION $30,160.00 PRINCIPAL, $7,651.55 INTEREST, $347.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $38,159.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LAVON GRANGER. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-09-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
